programmes.show_description: Hard Boiled Meg: Anarchic animated sitcom set in Rhode Island. Meg becomes a getaway driver, and when Quagmire is unable to cure his hiccups, he asks Peter to kill him.
You Are Here: US animated comedy series. Roger and Steve try to save a dying shopping mall, and Stan, Hayley, Klaus, and Francine start a food truck business.
The Three Fs: US animated comedy series. Francine's newfound friendship with a frog brings excitement to the whole Smith household, but it also drives their neighbour Greg crazy.
The Big Stieblitzki: Animated comedy. The Belchers get invited to a bowling birthday party for Rudy's father and try to make him look better than Rudy's mother's new boyfriend.
Mission Impossi-Bob: Animated comedy. Teddy gets stuck in an underground survival bunker and calls on Bob to get him out, and Linda and the kids make a giant celebratory hamburger.
Tests: Sitcom set in a police training college. Geeta freaks out about the dreaded bleep test, Bob gets in touch with his inner Spider-Man, and Paul gets a final warning.
The Crime Wave: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. The boys join a military fitness class to protect themselves amidst a crime wave in the city. Grumio starts dating a talented baker.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Nightmare in Red: Animated adventures. The gang undergo hypnosis to learn more about the ancient Annunaki race, the Evil Entity buried below Crystal Cove, and the way to defeat it.
Dark Night of the Hunters: Animated adventures. The team heads south of the border to search ancient Mayan ruins for the burial chamber of the Hunters of Secrets.
El Bandito: Animated series. The gang attends a Day of the Dead festival in Mexico, where Fred attempts to capture the ghost of the criminal, El Bandito.
Into the Mouth of Madcap: Animated series. Daphne babysits for her friend's son, but Fred is eager to crack the next case.
Rinat, George and Ernest battle to win the affections of Annabelle from Leeds. Will any of the lad wow her with their fashion choices?
Reality series. Sam and Billie open up about past traumas, Billie's health issues continue as the sisters undergo biological age testing, and Greg celebrates the big 4-0.
The whole group attend a charity event to raise money for Young Epilepsy, a charity close to Becks' heart after being diagnosed with epilepsy after the birth of her first child.
A Hairy Situation: Eva struggles in her bid to get Marley's last name legally changed. Following Dennis's re-proposal to Porsha, he also has to win her family back.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: New Friends, Same Jersey: US reality series. Teresa takes the opportunity to mend fences with Margaret when Melissa throws an '80s-inspired roller skating party.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
In the second instalment of the series, the campmates are in split camps which causes drama, and two new celebrities join them in either the main camp or Savannah Scrub.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the classic game show as players Paul, Lucy and Thomas compete to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues for a chance to win 50,000 pounds.
Essex's finest head to Barcelona for sun, fun and plenty of drama. Gemma and Arg take a bold step in their relationship while Lockie and Yaz hit a stumbling block.
Hot Tea with a Side of Cookies: Cynthia has a plan to help Tanya and Kenya work out their differences. Later, Cynthia visits fiance Mike in Los Angeles.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: Family, Family, Family: US reality series. Teresa kicks her wedding planning into high gear as Danielle hosts a mozzarella-making party to bring the girls together.
Stephen Mulhern hosts the classic game show as Jane, Ady and Laura compete to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues for a chance to win up to 50,000 pounds.
In the second instalment of the series, the campmates are in split camps which causes drama, and two new celebrities join them in either the main camp or Savannah Scrub.
Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.
Guac-a-Mole in Hell's Kitchen: US cooking competition. Things get spicy - and not just due to the salsa - when the chefs gamble for ingredients to create an elevated Mexican dish.
Pitch Imperfect: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter must regain his family's respect after making a humiliating throw during Oktoberfest, and Brian and Stewie become chiropractors.
Bend or Blockbuster: The Griffins go on a road trip to Bend, Oregon - which features the last Blockbuster store on Earth - to rent a video for a film night.
Prescription Heroine: Lois becomes addicted to painkillers prescribed for Brian after he gets hurt, and Peter's new table tennis table becomes a local hit.
I Heard You Wanna Buy Some Speakers: US animated comedy series. When Barry's dad's speakers get destroyed accidentally, Snot forces Barry to get replacements from Roger.
Smooshed: A Love Story: US animated comedy series. Steve goes on a class trip to Philadelphia in a bid to fall in love.
The Right Tough Stuff: Animated comedy. Linda fears for Gayle when she asks her to help shoot an audition tape for a reality TV show, and Bob struggles with a new electric grinder.
Jade in the Shade: Animated comedy. Linda and Louise stumble into a treasure-hunting adventure during a historical tour, and Bob, Tina and Gene host a group of street performers.
Stephen Mulhern returns with the exciting and iconic gameshow as one of the brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a chance of winning of a life-changing cash prize.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Gates of Gloom: Animated adventures. The gang return from their trip to the Yucatan peninsula to find that the whole of Crystal Cove has been enslaved by Professor Pericles.
Through the Curtain: Animated adventures. Using four keys, the gang find a hidden chamber and meet the Evil Entity, who reveals a secret that could change everything.
The Norse Case Scenario: Animated series. The gang goes on a camping trip to hone their mystery skills, but Viking ghosts attack and attempt to drive them away.
The People vs Fred Jones: Animated adventure series. Fred is on trial after being accused of being the real mastermind behind all the mysteries he's solved, but can Daphne save him?
Italian stallion Dom is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies. Which of the girl's outfits will bag them a date?
Reality series. The results of biological age testing reveal shocking news, Sam heads to LA on a glamorous work trip, and the sisters let their hair down at an Usher concert.
Essex's finest head to Barcelona for sun, fun and plenty of drama. Gemma and Arg take a bold step in their relationship while Lockie and Yaz hit a stumbling block.
Hot Tea with a Side of Cookies: Cynthia has a plan to help Tanya and Kenya work out their differences. Later, Cynthia visits fiance Mike in Los Angeles.

programmes.show_description: Family, Family, Family: US reality series. Teresa kicks her wedding planning into high gear as Danielle hosts a mozzarella-making party to bring the girls together.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
As the campmates battle it out to become a Legend, discover who won the first eating trial and which camp they end up in. Later, two campmates face a bone-chilling trial.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a special celebrity edition of the much-loved game show with Denise Van Outen, Coronation Street star Charlie Condou, and Jo Brand lining up this time.
After an explosive trip to Barcelona, the Essex residents are back with a bang. Yaz escapes to her family home and admits to her problems with Lockie.
Lions, and Tigers and Shade: NeNe and Cynthia attempt to work out their differences, and NeNe invites the ladies to a jungle-themed brunch.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: Boys Will Be Boys: US reality series. The drama at Danielle's mozzarella party eases after an olive branch from Teresa, but Louie and Joe soon cause it to return.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the game show with Ashley Roberts, Tim Vine, and Mel Giedroyc competing to identify well-known phrases and win thousands for charity.
As the campmates battle it out to become a Legend, discover who won the first eating trial and which camp they end up in. Later, two campmates face a bone-chilling trial.
Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.
Cook for Your Life: US cooking competition. The chefs tackle a patriotic twist that turns local pride into plate power when they represent their home states in a culinary face-off.
Hard Times at Adam West High: Anarchic animated sitcom. Chris tries to use Stewie's time machine to undo a dysfunction that occurs while he is giving a book report at school.
A Wife-Changing Experience: Anarchic animated sitcom. Joe reinvigorates his sex life with Bonnie after seeing Lois naked, and Stewie embraces a new lifestyle with an electric SUV.
All About Alana: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois' piano student Alana comes to work for the Griffins... and turns out to have sinister intentions.
